title: Kira Kiralina
writer: Panait Istrati, N. Plesskiy, Elena Valerskaya
plot: To pay off debts, Kira at 13 is sold by her parents to the old and rich Stavro. Constantly humiliated and beaten she gives birth to Dragomir and Kiralina. The trader Nazid kills Stavro to be able to sell Kiralina to a brothel.
